intro: Ceodes sechellarum, also known as Ceodecus sechellarum, is a plant species within the family Menispermaceae, native to the Seychelles. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various ailments such as arthritis and promote overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Ceodes sechellarum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
